name: I'm Gonna Be a Navy Officer!!!

issues.description: Missing deck look mechanic. DSL must first look at 3 cards from top of deck before selecting. Current DSL only searches deck without the 'look at 3' constraint.
Filter is 'Any' but should specify Navy type cards (excluding [I'm Gonna Be a Navy Officer!!!]). Must use type-based filtering with exclusion.
Missing second action to trash remaining cards. After selecting up to 1 card, the rest must be trashed from the looked cards.
Trigger should be 'OnPlay' (activated when card is played), not generic 'Trigger'.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] Look at 3 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Navy} type card other than [I'm Gonna Be a Navy Officer!!!] and add it to your hand. Then, trash the rest.
